'''Constancians''' were short, [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammalian]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] indigenous to [[Constancia/Legends|Constancia]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Constancians were [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] humanoids with flaming orange-[[Color/Legends|colored]] skin, orange [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and yellowish-gold [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. They had child-like features.

==History==
The Constancians evolved on the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Constancia/Legends|Constancia]]. The area around their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was explored sometime between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] and [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].

==Constancians in the galaxy==
[[Gamine]] and [[Sharlee]] were both Constancians.

==Appearances==
*"[[The Constancia Affair]]" {{Reprint|The Constancia Affair}} {{1st}}
